name: BreathAI Lab Website
description: The public home for BreathAI research, members, publications, and open-source artifacts.

name: Trace · Agent Evaluation Stack
description: Reproducible traces, metrics, and human-readable reports for tool-using agents. Public release planned Q3 2026.

name: Multilingual NLP Resources
description: An index of datasets, model cards, and resources for regional and multilingual NLP research, with a focus on Southeast Asian languages.
